TenantApplicationDefinition.description: Tenant application: a tenant's instance of an application, either installed from catalog, created from scratch, or modified from an installed base.

tenantId.description: Tenant that owns this application instance.

applicationId.description: Base application id (when source is catalog or when created from scratch referencing an app).

applicationReleaseId.description: Base application release id (when installed from catalog or when tenant app is based on a release).

catalogEntryId.description: Catalog entry id when installed from catalog.

source.description: How this tenant application was created: from catalog or from scratch.

status.description: Current status of the tenant application.

overrides.description: Tenant customizations applied on top of the base release (when tenant modifies installed application).
